title: Daily Briefing — Saturday, May 23
tldr: A research-milestone and money day, condensed. May 23 was an AI math result, IPO/profit news, and a governance reversal — notable, but not a craft play.
Nothing here is a non-technical, do-it-today move with a verifiable link, so it's kept short rather than padded.

blocks.p: A research milestone and funding news are signals to watch, not runnable plays. For the durable techniques from this week, see Weekly Issue #1.

sources: No run-it-today play survived re-grading for this date; entry condensed to keep the history honest.
